meaning: n.[生化]心肌黄酶,黄递酶,硫辛酰胺脱氢酶
examples: The sections of guinea pig asthma model lung tissues were stained with NADPH diaphorase .
Recent researches confirm that the neurons containing NO synthase can be shown by NADPH-diaphorase histochemical method.
MethodsNOS positive structures in the basal forebrain of the Wistar rats were observed with NADPH diaphorase improved histochemistry.
